channel.title: MYB
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from MYB, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Forecast Says 20% Chance. Will It Rain Or Not?
item.description: A deep dive into why people misunderstand the concept of percent chance of rain.

item.title: High-Impact Blizzard To Impact Major U.S. Cities
item.description: Major blizzard to affect the I-95 corridor Sunday and Monday. Here's the latest information.

item.title: Quordle Hints And Answers For Sunday, February 22
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: 3 Sales Superpowers And How AI Can Deliver Every One
item.description: AI Delivers 3 Superpowers To Boost Sales

item.title: NYT Strands Hints, Spangram, Answers: Sunday, February 22 (Olympics Wrap-Up)
item.description: Looking for some help with today's NYT Strands? An extra hint and the answers are right here to help you finish the grid and keep your streak intact.

item.title: Brown rice and status

item.title: “Hide competitive stats”

item.title: How to write a coaching/learning prompt
item.description: An AI like Claude is actually a pretty good fortune cookie. You can ask a simple question and get a simple answer, sometimes a profound one. But this ...
